meta_description: In this episode of Advanced Manufacturing Now, host Steve Plumb sits down with Dave Evans, CEO of Fictiv, to explore the company’s recent acquisition and what it means for the future of manufacturing. Dave shares the strategic thinking behind the deal, its potential to reshape global supply chains, and major industry trends like reshoring, digital

Compression Molding Experience lower tooling costs with high-quality durable parts. Urethane Casting Production quality parts without the tooling investment.
